picks.title: Strategic Partnerships Director - SI Alliances
picks.snippet: Strategic Partnerships Director focusing on System Integrator alliances and partnerships to drive business growth and revenue expansion.
picks.fullDescription: Velocity Global | LinkedIn Skip to main content LinkedIn Top Content People Learning Jobs Games Sign in Join now Velocity Global Software Development Denver, CO 75,516 followers Follow Discover all 426 employees Report this company About us Pebl puts a world of talent at your fingertips. With our Global Work Platform™, companies can hire, pay, and manage employees in 185+ countries—removing risk, red tape, and guesswork from global growth. Backed by more than a decade of local expertise and compliance leadership, Pebl is built to move as fast as your ambitions, whether you’re bringing on your first international teammate or scaling a workforce across continents. Our AI-powered, human-led platform integrates seamlessly with HRIS, HCM, and ATS systems and delivers instant, vetted answers in 50+ languages—so you stay compliant and confident wherever you grow. We’ve helped thousands of businesses—from Fortune 500s to rapid-growth start-ups—scale strategically around the world. Consistently named a leader in global Employer of Record (EOR) services, Pebl holds more employment licenses than any other EOR and is rated #1 for compliance on G2. With Pebl, companies everywhere can hire great talent anywhere. picks.title: Alliance Director - HR Tech & Fintech Partnerships
picks.snippet: We are seeking a results-driven Alliance Director to lead and expand regional and global partnerships in the HR tech and fintech space. This role focuses on driving revenue through co-selling initiatives.

picks.title: Head of Partnerships
picks.snippet: The Head of Partnerships will be on a mission to leverage their past record of success launching and growing partner programs to build and sustain Deel's partner marketplace and sales partnerships.
